title: Experience Storage
description: This small data package allows you to store experience in XP Book.
body:
This small data package allows you to store experience in XP Book.

<iframe width="1280" height="720" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/h0T3BXVoxZc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

The Book of Experience cannot be crafted, but can be found in the Ancient City, End City, or Stronghold Library.  

Holding right click will flow your experience into the XP book, and Shift + right click from the book to the player. 

Requires general [GalLab resourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gallab)

Texture by [Torrezx](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/torrezx/)
